disabled.description: Disable just this segment (independent of the control-level `disabled`).

href.description: Render this segment as a real link inside `SegmentedControl variant="navigation"`.

current.description: Marks this linked segment as the current route/filter.

currentToken.description: `aria-current` token emitted while `current` is true. Defaults to `"page"`.

value.description: Value this segment represents. Required when `href` is not provided.

controls.description:
ID of the panel this segment controls — only meaningful when the parent
`SegmentedControl` uses `variant="tablist"`.

unsupportedProps.name: leading
unsupportedProps.description: Optional decorative content rendered before the label, inside `aria-hidden`.

unsupportedProps.name: onclick
unsupportedProps.description:
Optional click handler for the rendered link. Disabled navigation segments
prevent default and do not call this handler.

unsupportedProps.name: trailing
unsupportedProps.description: Optional decorative content rendered after the label, inside `aria-hidden`.
